sources.name: Google Scholar
sources.query: Primary search engine for all phases P1–P5. Use Publish or Perish for batch export.

sources.name: arXiv (cs.MA, cs.AI, cs.GT, math.CO)
sources.query: Multi-agent POMDP, MARL, game theory, combinatorial search. Filter by cs.MA + cs.GT cross-listings for highest relevance.

sources.name: Semantic Scholar API
sources.query: Forward/backward citation graph traversal from anchor papers. Use /paper/{id}/citations and /paper/{id}/references endpoints.

sources.name: DBLP
sources.query: Venue-filtered search for AAMAS, AAAI, NeurIPS, IJCAI proceedings. Author disambiguation for prolific names (e.g., Oliehoek for Dec-POMDPs).

sources.name: JSTOR
sources.query: Historical weighing puzzle papers (Dyson 1946 era) and classic game theory (Crawford & Sobel 1982). American Mathematical Monthly archive.

sources.name: MathSciNet (AMS)
sources.query: Combinatorial search theory, weighing problem bounds, group testing. MSC codes: 94A20 (sampling theory), 62K05 (optimal designs), 05D05 (extremal set theory).

sources.name: zbMATH Open
sources.query: Backup for MathSciNet — open access. Search 'balance weighing' and 'coin weighing problem' with MSC filtering.

sources.name: EconLit / RePEc
sources.query: Cheap talk, Bayesian persuasion, information design, strategic communication. JEL codes: C72 (noncooperative games), D82 (asymmetric info), D83 (search/learning).

sources.name: ACM Digital Library
sources.query: AAMAS proceedings, EC (Economics and Computation) proceedings. Search 'multi-agent partially observable' and 'social deduction game'.

sources.name: Devil's Plan Fandom Wiki
sources.query: Scale Game rules page — room count, balance type, weight range, round structure, win condition. Cross-reference against episode footage.

sources.name: Reddit r/TheDevilsPlan
sources.query: Strategy analysis posts, rule clarification threads, player behavior breakdowns. Search 'scale game strategy' and 'weighing puzzle'.

sources.name: Naver Academic (Korean)
sources.query: Korean-language analysis of 더 데빌스 플랜 저울 게임. May contain game-theory analyses from Korean academics given the show's domestic popularity.

sources.name: Papers With Code
sources.query: Search 'multi-agent reinforcement learning partial observability' and 'Hanabi' for benchmark comparisons and MAPPO implementation references.

sources.name: Knuth TAOCP Vol 3 §6.2
sources.query: Canonical treatment of sorting and searching with comparisons, including balance-weighing as a special case. Provides tightest known bounds for deterministic strategies.

sources.name: Oliehoek & Amato (2016) — Dec-POMDPs textbook
sources.query: Chapters on communication in Dec-POMDPs, complexity results, approximation algorithms. Key reference for SQ1 formalization choices.

sources.name: Aigner (1988) — Combinatorial Search
sources.query: Chapter on weighing problems — covers Dyson's solution, generalizations, information-theoretic lower bounds. Definitive pre-2000 reference for SQ2.
